raw_text: I order icecream and I got opened package and when I raise refund I got a mrp amount but if I order it again I have to pay the delivery charges night charges costumer service is not good and the catch is when I tried to order again the same icecream it's out of stock wowww that means it was last damage piece in the store they didn't updated the inventory and they send that damage product disgusting service 👏🏻👏🏻☹️

I am satisfied with the service but there's a problem. I always do cod. but when the delivery time in between 12 -6 am , there's no option for cod and I don't have other options for payment and I don't want to link my bank account with blinkit for personal reasons. and I need to purchase something at 4 am but I can't because of the payment process. it's an emergency. please do something with that issue.

I ordered a very expensive Philips air fryer. But I received a very badly used and dirty fryer with dirty packaging. I reported the issue to them and they said that they sent the product in good condition. Never buy anything expensive from Blinkit. I will file a consumer complaint against them, but it is better to be safe than sorry.
product are soo good and fresh and they also delivered grocery in time..but if you order only one thing under 100 they will charge a lot...so I request to blinkit plz do something about this...
Service unavailable for past 4-5 days in my area. Orders are hardly on commited time ever. Store status showing permanently closed for the past 1 month. What kind of service are you providing??

worst app service.been loosing items in every order since 2-3 months.when confronted with delivery person they say they aren't responsible try contacting customer service,when tried to raise complaint the autobot redirects to contact via mail to blinkit team when tried mailing them they keep saying as per records the order was successful,even tried mailing grievance officee at blinkit,same replies.chatbot used ve helpful in initial days resolving issues on spot,beenloosing money,items constantly

I have Ordered Lion Dates which were damaged when complained about it through Mail.. The only reply is that product is in good condition... what do I gain to tell that product is not good and customer care executive spoke in a very rash tone in her tone she is saying that I am Lying is that the way to talk to Customers... better stop ordering on blink it and choose another delivery App... Think twice before ordering..
Super reliable and lightning-fast! Orders always arrive within 10 minutes, and the real-time tracking is spot on. Perfect for last-minute cravings and urgent groceries. Thank yuhhh!!

I ordered a Beardo trimmer from Blinkit today. The outer package was in good condition, but when I tried to switch on the trimmer, it did not start at all. I then charged it and tried again, but it still would not turn on. It is clearly a defective product. I have been trying to contact Blinkit support throughout the day, but I have not received any valid response. I want a refund urgently.

It's ok. Blinkit needs a better customer service where someone can actually interact with an actual person. The help chat is very limited and inconvenient. I have an issue which isn't listed in the chatbot and there's no way to contact an actual person about my issue.

Bloody fraudsters. Absolutely disappointed with Blinkit. I ordered Airdopes and received an empty box instead of the product. When I contacted customer support, all they did was send a generic reply saying they would “take care of it next time.” What about the money I paid? I neither received the product nor got a proper resolution. This is completely unacceptable. Never trusting Blinkit again.

Blink it is a good app and very convinent to order for anything needed I like the app but 1 thing I dint understand is that if I want to replace anything its not easy after sending the video of the ordered Items

This app is so good.Its a really good app at emergency or if we need other groceries and can't go outside.I gave it 4 stars because when I ordered on blinkit I paid online then after that I closed it mistakenly so I reopened it then the order was not placed and the money was gone It was likes 250 rupees

I am very disappointed from blink it very bad service, also not received any response from the support and complain department not replying properly.Need to pay extra to service that should be free and still not receiving the service which needs to be received, now I am not willing to continue to this wrost service app. Very bad experience, before this i was using from last 3 years but now I will delete my account.

06 june 2026 blinkit no more reliable. got fed up from their service, they don't value your time . Nowadays they don't care about your health. They will pack all chemicals with food items,eatable things,reported many times ,same thing happened again and again Paneer with alla fabric bleach, that bleach bottle doesn't come with inside seal or sticker, so it always got leaked a bit. Can't post photo here otherwise can display the items . No words left ...:(
Order marked as delivered but I did not receive all items. Customer support was unable to resolve the issue. Very disappointing experience.

The amount was taken immediately after placing the order, but the amount was cut. The order was not placed. He gave 5 working days for it. If the refund is made within 24 hours, then the amount is the same. Everyone needs it. totally dissopointed please .ake it fast refund

Not so bad of an app when you is when you're in a pinch. Lots of security features to help you with your purchases to make sure everything turns out safe and well. I would recommend it to someone who is new to an area.

I stopped using Blinkit because of its pathetic service in 2025 and today I ordered again hoping it could have been changed but it's worse than previous experience. I wanted to cancel the order because it was delayed by 20 minutes then the expected time but they charged me 20 for that .. DISGUSTING SERVICE AND

I like blinkit because it says that the order will arrive in 8 minutes but it reaches in 5 or 4 mins, it is a bad point that it shows 8 minutes and come in 5 or 4 minutes but it is nice to come before. the best app I have ever used.
